title: Walfos Silicone Pasta Colander - Collapsible Colander with Handle Set, Set of 2, Space-Saving Kitchen Strainers, 1.5 Quart, 2 Quart, BPA Free ＆ Dishwasher Safe, for Pasta, Vegetables, Fruits (Red)
features: 🍎SAFE & DURABLE MATERIAL – Walfos silicone collapsible colanders are made of 100% food grade silicone and plastic, no odor and non-toxic. BPA free. Heat-Resistant up to 230° F. Sturdy design, thickened folding seams make it stronger and more durable than others, built to last.

🥦LARGE CAPACITY – Microperforated holes drain faster and prevent fall-through. 4 Quart capacity can hold and drain everything like pasta, spaghetti, noodles, grains, berry, fruits, vegetables, beans, broccoli, potatoes and more. Easy to clean and dishwasher safe.

🍅FOLDABLE & SPACE SAVING – Ergonomic and space-saving design. The silicone folding strainers can be folded down to under 1.5 inch, save much space for your kitchen and convenient to store in kitchen drawer, cabinet or drying tray, even can be hung on hook. Perfect for small kitchen, camping, RV, travel trailer.

🍝VERSATILE: Three different size foldable colanders give you more choices to satisfy your different cooking needs like holding, washing, rinsing or draining. Comfortable handles make your kitchen job more convenient. Including: 1.5-Quart, 2-Quart and 4-Quart.
